languages.text: {n}Манипулус хлопает себя по лбу.{/n} "Естественно. Основные критерии эксперимента — воспроизводимость и консистентность. Один неудачный опыт — и я готов сдаться? Абсурд! Неужели нужно заменить увечные объекты на здоровых? Критерии отбора определенно требуют пересмотра".

{n}The Manipulus claps a hand to his forehead.{/n} "Of course! The main criteria of an experiment are reproducibility and consistency. One failed trial, and I'm ready to give up? Absurd! Is replacing injured subjects with healthy ones truly the answer? A rethink of the selection criteria is most certainly in order."
languages.original_text: {n}Манипулус хлопает себя по лбу.{/n} "Естественно. Основные критерии эксперимента — воспроизводимость и консистентность. Один неудачный опыт — и я готов сдаться? Абсурд! Неужели нужно заменить увечные объекты на здоровых? Критерии отбора определенно требуют пересмотра".

Absurd! Is replacing injured subjects with healthy ones truly the answer? A rethink of the selection criteria is most certainly in order."

languages.text: {n}マニピュラスは額を叩き。{/n} 「当然だ！実験の主な基準は再現性と一貫性だ。失敗した試行一つで諦めるなんて、馬鹿げている！怪我をした被験者を健全な者で置き換えるのが本当に答えなのか？選定基準の見直しは、間違いなく必要だ。」
languages.original_text: {n}The Manipulus claps a hand to his forehead.{/n} "Of course! The main criteria of an experiment are reproducibility and consistency. One failed trial, and I'm ready to give up? Absurd! Is replacing injured subjects with healthy ones truly the answer? A rethink of the selection criteria is most certainly in order."

traits.locale_text: マニピュラスは額を叩き、「当然だ！実験の主な基準は再現性と一貫性だ。失敗した試行一つで諦めるなんて、馬鹿げている！怪我をした被験者を健全な者で置き換えるのが本当に答えなのか？選定基準の見直しは、間違いなく必要だ。」

languages.text: {n}操纵者拍了一下自己的额头。{/n}“当然！实验的核心标准在于可重复性与一致性。仅仅失败了一次，我就准备放弃了？荒谬！用健康的实验体替换受伤的实验体会是答案吗？毫无疑问，筛选标准亟待重构。”
languages.original_text: {n}The Manipulus claps a hand to his forehead.{/n} "Of course! The main criteria of an experiment are reproducibility and consistency. One failed trial, and I'm ready to give up? Absurd! Is replacing injured subjects with healthy ones truly the answer? A rethink of the selection criteria is most certainly in order."

traits.locale_text: {n}操纵者拍了一下自己的额头。{/n}“当然！实验的核心标准在于可重复性与一致性。仅仅失败了一次，我就准备放弃了？荒谬！用健康的实验体替换受伤的实验体会是答案吗？毫无疑问，筛选标准亟待重构。”

languages.text: {n}Le manipulus se frappe le front.{/n} « Mais bien sûr ! Les principaux critères d'une expérience sont la reproductibilité et la cohérence. Je suis prêt à baisser les bras après un unique échec ? C'est tout bonnement ridicule ! Mais la solution réside-t-elle vraiment dans le remplacement des sujets blessés par des sujets sains ? Il faut absolument que je révise les critères de sélection. »
languages.original_text: {n}The Manipulus claps a hand to his forehead.{/n} "Of course! The main criteria of an experiment are reproducibility and consistency. One failed trial, and I'm ready to give up? Absurd! Is replacing injured subjects with healthy ones truly the answer? A rethink of the selection criteria is most certainly in order."

traits.locale_text: {n}Le manipulus se frappe le front.{/n} « Mais bien sûr ! Les principaux critères d'une expérience sont la reproductibilité et la cohérence. Je suis prêt à baisser les bras après un unique échec ? C'est tout bonnement ridicule ! Mais la solution réside-t-elle vraiment dans le remplacement des sujets blessés par des sujets sains ? Il faut absolument que je révise les critères de sélection. »

languages.text: {n}El manipulus se lleva una mano a la frente.{/n} «¡Claro! Los criterios principales de un experimento son la reproducibilidad y la consistencia. ¿Voy a rendirme por una sola prueba fallida? ¡Absurdo! ¿Es realmente la solución utilizar sujetos sanos, en lugar de heridos? Debo reconsiderar los criterios de selección, eso es evidente».
languages.original_text: {n}The Manipulus claps a hand to his forehead.{/n} "Of course! The main criteria of an experiment are reproducibility and consistency. One failed trial, and I'm ready to give up? Absurd! Is replacing injured subjects with healthy ones truly the answer? A rethink of the selection criteria is most certainly in order."

Los criterios principales de un experimento son la reproducibilidad y la consistencia. ¿Voy a rendirme por una sola prueba fallida? ¡Absurdo! ¿Es realmente la solución utilizar sujetos sanos, en lugar de heridos? Debo reconsiderar los criterios de selección, eso es evidente».

languages.text: {n}Manipülus elini alnına vuruyor.{/n} "Elbette! Bir deneyin ana kriterleri, tekrarlanabilirlik ve tutarlılıktır. Başarısız oldum diye pes mi edeceğim? Saçmalık! Yaralı denekleri sağlıklı olanlarla değiştirmek çözüm olur mu peki? Seçim kriterlerinin yeniden düşünülmesi kesinlikle şart."
languages.original_text: {n}The Manipulus claps a hand to his forehead.{/n} "Of course! The main criteria of an experiment are reproducibility and consistency. One failed trial, and I'm ready to give up? Absurd! Is replacing injured subjects with healthy ones truly the answer? A rethink of the selection criteria is most certainly in order."

traits.locale_text: {n}Manipülus elini alnına vuruyor.{/n} "Elbette! Bir deneyin ana kriterleri, tekrarlanabilirlik ve tutarlılıktır. Başarısız oldum diye pes mi edeceğim? Saçmalık! Yaralı denekleri sağlıklı olanlarla değiştirmek çözüm olur mu peki? Seçim kriterlerinin yeniden düşünülmesi kesinlikle şart."

languages.text: {n}Der Manipulus schlägt sich mit der Hand an die Stirn.{/n} "Natürlich! Die Hauptkriterien eines Experiments sind Reproduzierbarkeit und Konsistenz. Eine gescheiterte Prüfung und ich bin bereit, aufzugeben? Absurd! Ist die Ersetzung verletzter Subjekte durch gesunde wirklich die Antwort? Ein Umdenken hinsichtlich der Auswahlkriterien ist gewiss in Ordnung."
